message:
fix(dolt): per-issue ephemeral routing in batch creation

CreateIssuesWithFullOptions previously only routed ALL-ephemeral batches
to the wisps table. Mixed batches (e.g., refinery merges containing both
issues and wisps) sent everything through insertIssue(), which hardcodes
INSERT INTO issues. This caused 1,564 wisp-pattern rows to pollute the
permanent issues table across all 3 databases (Clown Show #21 root cause).

Now each issue in the batch is individually routed based on its Ephemeral
flag or ID pattern (-wisp-). Ephemeral issues go to wisps/wisp_events/
wisp_labels/wisp_comments/wisp_dependencies; permanent issues go to the
standard tables.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
